org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.environment

Interface SituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Environment<AT>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSituatedEnvironment, WorldGrid
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public interface SituatedEnvironment<AT extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>
extends Environment<AT>
    Interface representant un environment.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      <T extends AB> 
      T      		 getAgentBody(AgentIdentifier agent)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the body of the agent inside the environment.
      Collection<AB> getAllAgentBodies()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies all the bodies of the agents inside the environment.
      OB getObjectBody(Identifier object)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the location of the object (excluding agents) inside the environment.
      boolean influence(IT... influences)
      Deprecated. 
      Send an influence to the environment.
      PT[] perceive(AgentIdentifier agent)
      Deprecated. 
      Compute and replies the perceptions for the specified agent.

      • Methods inherited from interface org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.Environment

        getSimulationClock, init, isAlive, postAgentScheduling, preAgentScheduling, putAgent, removeAgent, shutdown

    • Method Detail

      • getAllAgentBodies

        Collection<AB> getAllAgentBodies()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies all the bodies of the agents inside the environment.

      • getAgentBody

        <T extends AB> T getAgentBody(AgentIdentifier agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the body of the agent inside the environment.
        Returns:
        the location according to the environment dimension, ie. an array of size 1 if the environment is 1D, of size 2 for an 2D environment...

      • getObjectBody

        OB getObjectBody(Identifier object)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the location of the object (excluding agents) inside the environment.
        Returns:
        the spatial description of the object.

      • influence

        boolean influence(IT... influences)
        Deprecated. 
        Send an influence to the environment.
        Parameters:
        influences - is the list of influences to send to this environment.
        Returns:
        true if the influences was registered, otherwise false

      • perceive

        PT[] perceive(AgentIdentifier agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Compute and replies the perceptions for the specified agent.
